# OpenQuote — Yiwu remote sourcing assistant (中国义乌远程私人采购助理)

> An independent, on-the-ground personal buying assistant inside Yiwu, China — the world's largest small-commodity wholesale market. We verify the REAL supplier price for overseas importers, in person. Fixed research fees from US$29; a transparent 5% service fee for full order handling. We never mark up the goods price and never take commission or kickback from suppliers.

## What we do
- Price check — US$29: 1 product, 2 real suppliers + original quotes, with dated on-site photos/video from the Yiwu market.
- Standard — US$59: 3 products, 6 real suppliers + quotes (2 per product).
- New-product discovery — from US$99: 8 product opportunities in one category (photos, price ranges, sourcing leads).
- Add-ons: +US$15 per extra product, +US$10 per extra discovery opportunity, rush / extra supplier / on-site video.
- Full order handling (factory/booth visit, sample run, QC inspection, consolidation, order follow-up): real price + a transparent 5% service fee, paid by the buyer and itemized — never hidden in the goods price.

## Why we are different (assistant, not agent)
- Paid only by the buyer (a transparent service fee); we never take commission or kickback from the supplier side, and never add markup to the goods.
- A traditional "free" sourcing agent usually takes a 10–15% commission from the supplier that gets baked into your goods price — hidden, and it grows with every order. Our fee is visible, itemized, and about half that or less.
- We are physically present in Yiwu and verify each price in person; you keep the supplier contacts and every decision.

## Who it is for
- Importers already buying from China who want to check whether their current agent's price has been marked up.
- First-time / remote buyers who want to understand the real market before traveling to China.

## Guide
- "Source from Yiwu without traveling" — a US$19 multilingual guide covering districts, price reality, remote negotiation, scam avoidance, samples, payment, logistics and customs.

## Languages
English, Español, العربية, Français, Português, Русский, 中文.

- 中文: https://yiwuquote.com/zh/
- Contact: via WhatsApp (button on the site).

## Location
Yiwu, Zhejiang, China.
